cards.title: Quality of Service (SERVQUAL)
cards.content:
ΓÇó Reliability: Doing what was promised.
ΓÇó Responsiveness: Prompt service.
ΓÇó Assurance: Building trust.
ΓÇó Empathy: Caring for the customer.
ΓÇó Tangibles: Physical facilities and appearance.

cards.title: Agent's Role
cards.content:
ΓÇó The agent is the "Best Advice" provider at the Point of Sale.
ΓÇó Responsible for ensuring the Proposal Form is filled truthfully.
ΓÇó Helps in Policy Renewal and during the Claim Stage.

items.text: Paying full attention, demonstrating understanding, and responding without judgement.
Body language, eye contact, and posture make up a huge part of communication.
Ethical behavior builds Trust, which is the foundation of the insurance business.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: Customer Lifetime Value: The total economic value a customer brings over their entire life.
First impression is critical. Dress professionally and be punctual.
Always explain both the benefits AND the exclusions (what is not covered) to the customer.
Never indulge in mis-selling or hiding facts just to earn a commission.
Insurance is an intangible product; the customer only receives a "promise to pay", making trust vital.
